title: analytics — scheduled tasks
description: Four entries: retry-failed-deliveries every 30s, reconcile-identities nightly, purge-expired-data weekly, sampling-reconcile nightly.

entries.name: retry-failed-deliveries
entries.purpose: Every 30 seconds — scan analytics_deliveries where status IN (failed, rate_limited) AND next_retry_at <= now(). Dispatch DispatchToProviderJob to retry. Bounded batch (100 rows / invocation).

entries.name: reconcile-identities
entries.purpose: Daily 03:00 UTC per tenant. Runs ReconcileAnalyticsIdentityJob: purges dangling anonymous identities (no activity > 90 days), backfills subject_id on events whose owner is now identified, hard-purges identified identities whose User was erased > 30 days ago.

entries.name: purge-expired-data
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 04:00 UTC. Runs PurgeExpiredAnalyticsDataJob: deliveries > 90 days, events > 2 years (5 with extended retention), configs deleted_at > 90 days. Ordering: deliveries first (they RESTRICT event deletion).

entries.name: sampling-reconcile
entries.purpose: Daily 04:00 UTC. Computes actual vs configured sampling_rate per (provider, event_name) for the past 24h. Emits monitoring metrics + fires AnalyticsHighDropRateNotification when drift > 5%.
